descriptionShort: Red Deer Advocate article about the Kings roster and opening game lineups, mentioning Bill Hardy's prior season with Richmond Sockeyes.
descriptionLong: Red Deer Advocate coverage of the Red Deer Kings' roster composition and game preparation, dated October 22, 1987. The article discusses the Kings' defensive pairings, goaltending options (Ward Willson and Lyle Mast), and forward line combinations. Notable mention of newcomer Bill Hardy, who previously played with the Richmond Sockeyes in the prior season.
